app.title: speech-to-text.me
app.footer: Max 15 seconds per recording or upload audio files up to 25MB. 5 free transcriptions per day.

landing.heroTitle: Convert Speech to Text Instantly with AI
landing.heroSubtitle: Free, accurate transcription powered by advanced AI. Record your voice or upload audio files and get text in seconds.
landing.heroNote: No signup required. 5 free transcriptions daily.
landing.demoText: Hello, this is a sample transcription. Our AI converts your speech to text with high accuracy...
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to convert speech to text quickly and accurately
landing.feature1Desc: Use your microphone to record audio directly in the browser. No downloads required.
landing.feature2Desc: Support for MP3, WAV, M4A, WEBM, OGG, FLAC, and more. Up to 25MB file size.
landing.feature3Desc: Transcribe in English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Chinese, Japanese, and many more.
landing.feature4Desc: AI automatically corrects grammar, adds punctuation, and generates summaries.
landing.feature5Desc: Create shareable links or export directly to X, Facebook, and WhatsApp.
landing.feature6Desc: Audio files are not stored. Shared links expire in 24 hours for your security.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Get accurate transcriptions in just a few simple steps
landing.step1Desc: Click the microphone or drag & drop an audio file
landing.step2Desc: Advanced AI transcribes your audio with high accuracy
landing.step3Desc: AI enhances the text and generates a summary
landing.step4Desc: Copy, create a link, or share to social media
landing.useCasesSubtitle: From meetings to lectures, our tool adapts to your needs
landing.useCase1Desc: Never miss a word. Get accurate notes from your business meetings and interviews.
landing.useCase2Desc: Transcribe lectures, focus groups, and research interviews effortlessly.
landing.useCase3Desc: Convert podcasts and video content into blog posts and show notes.
landing.useCase4Desc: Speed up your workflow by transcribing voice memos and interviews.
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about our transcription service
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Convert your first audio to text in seconds. No signup required.

transcribe.pageSubtitle: Record your voice or upload an audio file to get started

recorder.idle: Tap the microphone to start recording

fileUpload.title: Upload audio file
fileUpload.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported audio format. Please use MP3, WAV, M4A, WEBM, OGG, or FLAC.
fileUpload.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 25MB.

about.title: About speech-to-text.me
about.description: speech-to-text.me is a free online tool that converts your voice recordings into accurate text transcriptions. Powered by advanced AI technology, our service provides high-quality speech recognition and intelligent summarization.
about.feature1Desc: State-of-the-art speech recognition supports 30+ languages with high accuracy for various accents and dialects.
about.feature2Desc: Get concise summaries of your transcriptions, plus automatic grammar and punctuation corrections.
about.feature3Desc: Share your transcriptions instantly with a secure link. Share directly to social media or copy to clipboard.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Click the microphone button to record your voice directly in the browser, or upload an existing audio file (MP3, WAV, M4A, and more formats supported).
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our advanced AI engine processes your audio and converts speech to text with high accuracy in over 30 languages.
howItWorks.step3Desc: AI analyzes your transcript to fix grammar, add proper punctuation, and generates a concise summary of the content.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Copy your transcription to clipboard, create a shareable link, or share directly to social media platforms like X, Facebook, and WhatsApp.

useCases.title: Use Cases
useCases.intro: speech-to-text.me is perfect for a wide range of applications:
useCases.case1Desc: Record meetings and get accurate transcriptions with summaries. Never miss important details from your business discussions.
useCases.case2Desc: Transcribe lectures, interviews, and research recordings. Focus on learning while AI captures every word.
useCases.case3Desc: Convert podcast episodes, video scripts, and voice memos into text. Perfect for creating blog posts and show notes.
useCases.case4Desc: Transcribe interviews and voice notes quickly. Spend less time typing and more time crafting your story.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! You can make up to 5 free transcriptions per day without creating an account. Each recording can be up to 15 seconds, or you can upload audio files up to 25MB.
faq.a2: We support over 30 languages including English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, Hindi, and many more. You can select your language or use auto-detection.
faq.a3: Our transcriptions use state-of-the-art speech recognition technology. Accuracy depends on audio quality, but typically exceeds 95% for clear recordings.
faq.a4: Yes. We do not store your audio files after processing. Transcriptions are processed securely and shared links automatically expire after 24 hours.
faq.a5: We support MP3, WAV, M4A, WEBM, OGG, FLAC, and most common audio formats. Files can be up to 25MB in size.
faq.q6: How does the AI summary work?
faq.a6: After transcription, AI analyzes your text to correct grammar, add punctuation, and generate a concise summary highlighting the key points of your recording.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Content: At speech-to-text.me, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our speech-to-text transcription service.
privacy.section2Content: We collect minimal information necessary to provide our service:
privacy.section2Item1: Audio recordings you submit for transcription (temporarily processed, not stored)
privacy.section2Item2: IP address for rate limiting purposes (to ensure fair usage)
privacy.section2Item3: Usage analytics to improve our service (anonymized data)
privacy.section3Content: Your information is used solely for:
privacy.section3Item1: Processing your audio and generating transcriptions
privacy.section3Item2: Providing AI-powered summaries and text corrections
privacy.section3Item3: Enforcing usage limits (5 transcriptions per day per IP)
privacy.section4Content: We do not store your audio files. After processing, audio data is immediately deleted. Shared transcription links expire automatically after 24 hours and are then permanently deleted from our servers.
privacy.section5Content: We use third-party AI services for speech recognition and summarization. Your audio and text data is processed securely. We also use Google AdSense for advertising, which may use cookies to serve relevant ads.
privacy.section6Content: We use essential cookies to remember your preferences (theme, language). Third-party advertising services may also set cookies. You can control cookie settings in your browser.
privacy.section7Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through our website.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: By using speech-to-text.me, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our service.
terms.section2Content: speech-to-text.me provides free online speech-to-text transcription services with the following limitations:
terms.section2Item3: 5 free transcriptions per day per user
terms.section3Content: You agree not to use our service for any illegal purposes, to transcribe content that violates others' rights, or to attempt to circumvent usage limits. We reserve the right to block users who abuse our service.
terms.section4Content: You retain all rights to your original audio content and resulting transcriptions. We do not claim ownership of your content. Our service, including its design, code, and AI models, is protected by intellectual property laws.
terms.section5Content: Our service is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. While we strive for accuracy, we cannot guarantee that transcriptions will be error-free. Always review important transcriptions for accuracy.
terms.section6Content: We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of our service, including but not limited to transcription errors, data loss, or service interruptions.
terms.section7Content: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

aboutPage.title: About speech-to-text.me
aboutPage.missionContent: We believe everyone should have access to accurate speech-to-text transcription tools. Our mission is to provide a free, easy-to-use service that helps people convert their audio recordings into text quickly and accurately.
aboutPage.whatWeDoContent: speech-to-text.me provides powerful audio processing tools:
aboutPage.feature1: Speech-to-Text Transcription - Convert voice recordings and audio files into accurate text transcripts
aboutPage.feature2: AI-Powered Enhancement - Automatic grammar correction, punctuation, and content summarization
aboutPage.feature3: PDF to Audio - Transform PDF documents into natural-sounding audio files
aboutPage.feature4: Multi-Language Support - Transcription available in 30+ languages
aboutPage.technologyContent: We use state-of-the-art artificial intelligence and machine learning models to provide highly accurate transcriptions. Our speech recognition supports various accents, dialects, and speaking styles to ensure the best possible results.
aboutPage.privacyContent: We take your privacy seriously. Audio files are processed securely and are not stored after transcription. Shared links expire automatically after 24 hours. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
aboutPage.contactContent: Have questions, feedback, or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have a question, feedback, or need help? Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.directEmail: You can also reach us directly at:
